---
title: "Certificates"
toc: false
---

## Academic Credentials

**Graduate Teaching Certificate**  
University of Texas at Dallas

**GIS Certificate**  
University of Texas at Dallas

## ESRI / ArcGIS Training

- Introduction to GIS
- Spatial Analysis
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]
- [ESRI course name]

*Replace the bracketed entries above with your actual ESRI course names.*
